ZONE_6: standing high-table area near a window with brushed steel high stools and exposed industrial ceiling, with coworkers active in the clearly visible background, modern dynamic energy

ZONE_10: modern library and study nook with floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves full of books, warm reading lamps and a person reading in a comfortable armchair, cozy focused mood, background clearly visible
ZONE_11: bright open-plan office beside large windows, with clusters of modern desks, monitors and ergonomic chairs and several coworkers actively working in the background; light, airy and busy, minimal greenery, background clearly visible with light depth of field
